prompt: Design a weekly group Bible study rhythm inside Reveal’s community.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Passages notes model
nodes.details: Content model: study series, weekly sessions, passages, member notes, schedule timestamps.

nodes.label: Facilitator member roles
nodes.details: Roles: facilitator vs member; authz on creating sessions and posting prompts.

nodes.label: Reminder job schedule
nodes.details: Cron/job for weekly reminders respecting quiet notification prefs.

nodes.label: Study series APIs
nodes.details: CRUD for series/sessions on postgres; link to community home feed item type.

nodes.label: Engagement metrics OOS
nodes.details: Out of scope this slice: streak gamification and engagement leaderboards.
